functions.title: Guide Book #11
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #11§r
§lMud Cube§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Cube, Earth-elemental, Magical, Monster.
•§lSpawn in§r: Forest, Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Pale Garden, Taiga, Swamp, Mangrove.

•§lHealth§r: 8-16
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.15
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water.
•§lPossible drops§r: Mud Ball, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 3
•§lMelee effect§r: Slowness §o(0:10)§r

§lDescription§r:
§‘Mud Cubes slither through swamps and forests. Though slow-moving, their sticky bodies can bog down prey with each strike, inflicting a brief slowness that makes escape harder. These muddy menaces drop Mud Balls when defeated —
remnants of the living earth that once held them together.§’
